name: Chocolate Cake Ala Florence
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9x9x2 inch pan.
3. Place the shaved chocolate in hot water. Stir until melted.
4. Cool the melted chocolate.
5. Sift the dry ingredients into a mixing bowl.
6. Add the softened butter to the dry ingredients.
7. Beat for 2 minutes at low speed.
8. Gradually add the remaining ingredients and beat for another 2 minutes at low speed.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake for 30-35 minutes.
